narrative:
Highland Heights City has 6,875 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.8% D−R vs -4.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
